title: US bans new foreign-made consumer internet routers
description: There are almost no major brands of internet routers that are manufactured in the US.
content:
The US has banned new foreign-made consumer internet routers over national security concerns.
In an update on Monday to a list of equipment seen as not secure enough for use, the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) added all consumer-grade router... [2696 chars]

title: Heat pumps for all new homes and plug-in solar in green tech drive
description: Solar panels that can be plugged in at home could be available to buy in supermarkets in the coming months.
content:
Developers will be required to install solar panels and heat pumps in all new homes in England as part of updated planning requirements published by the government.
It also said plug-in panels that homeowners can self-install on balconies would be av... [3646 chars]

title: 'A declaration of war': How councils are resisting one of Labour's core objectives
description: A developer has written to the housing minister after a local council rejected a planning application just 24 hours after being told to approve it.
content:
Councils are ignoring explicit instructions to approve planning projects from ministers - as the scale and cost of their resistance to development is revealed for the first time.
It comes as tensions between councils of all political stripes are risi... [4066 chars]

title: 'Trump blinks first' and 'horrific' attack on Jewish charity ambulances
description: Donald Trump's claim of productive talks with Iran and the attack on a Jewish charity in London is the main focus for Tuesday's front pages.
content: The US president's claim of productive talks with Iran amid the ongoing conflict in the Middle East features heavily on Tuesday's front pages. Donald Trump has said he plans to jointly "run the Strait" of Hormuz with Iran, the Daily Telegraph reports... [3102 chars]

title: Would you build your own apps?
description: Start-ups are offering tech for novices to create apps with the help of AI.
content:
Recently I decided to have a go at building some apps.
Not long ago, that would have been a job for specialists. But start-ups have emerged offering app production for the novice, with the help of AI.
